data.four_set_effect: Gaining Elemental Particles or Orbs gives 3 Energy to all party members who have a bow or a catalyst equipped. Can only occur once every 3s.

circlet_of_logos.desc: This corrective lens helped restore the vision of one whose eyes were damaged from intensive studying.
circlet_of_logos.title: Scholar's Lens

flower_of_life.desc: A dried flower used as a bookmark. It has absorbed the scent from the pages.
flower_of_life.title: Scholar's Bookmark

goblet_of_eonothem.desc: Originally designed to hold drinking water, this cup was stained black after a scholar used it to wash their paint brushes.
goblet_of_eonothem.title: Scholar's Ink Cup

plume_of_death.desc: A bird's feather that serves as a quill pen. The tip has long been stained black.
plume_of_death.title: Scholar's Quill Pen

sands_of_eon.desc: A small desktop clock, whose former owner was a scholar sat in a windowless room buried in books. This was probably the only reference they had to the time of day.
sands_of_eon.title: Scholar's Clock

list.desc: Flowers were a rare sight for the scholar who lived in her ivory tower, buried under piles of books.</br>A young man, who admired the scholar, once gave her this exotic flower in the hope of bringing some life to the dull and lonely days she spent in her study.</br>The scholar accepted the gift gratefully and made a flower bookmark with it.</br>Ever since then, there has always been a splash of vivid color hidden somewhere in the pages of the dull piles of books.</br>
list.title: Scholar's Bookmark

list.desc: The pursuit of knowledge is a risky gamble. Even after devoting one's entire life to it, it may prove to have been futile.</br>The scholar spent half of her lifetime in endless research, taking notes and making calculations.</br>Having failed to find the answers she was looking for, she once hesitated and questioned her career choice, thus wasting further time.</br>Her once sharp eyesight had also been damaged by intensive reading.</br>All this, and the answers she sought were still beyond her reach.</br>
list.title: Scholar's Lens

list.desc: A delicate tea cup that belonged to a scholar. This treasured cup is made of light porcelain and gilded with gold stripes.</br>The dainty cup was in stark contrast with the messy room in which it was found, but seemed to suggest that the scholar was from a well-to-do family.</br>Not caring about the beauty and purpose of the tea cup, the scholar in her ivory tower dipped her quill pen in it.</br>She only saw it as a convenient ware to wash the tip. Now covered in ink stains, the cup has long since lost its former elegance.</br>
list.title: Scholar's Ink Cup

list.desc: The scholar's quill pen is made from the feather of an exotic bird.</br>After an enormous amount of writing, the feather has been stained black.</br>In all her years, the scholar never thought of changing her stained quill pen for a new one.</br>Just as an old soldier feels most at ease with his own weapon, the scholar needed her familiar quill pen.</br>
list.title: Scholar's Quill Pen

list.desc: A delicate clock placed carefully on the scholar's desk.</br>Spending days and nights in her study, the scholar lost all sense of time.</br>This exquisite clock served as a beacon guiding the scholar in her relentless pursuit of knowledge.</br>The time the scholar spent would prove to be fruitful. Knowledge would find its way to her.</br>
list.title: Scholar's Clock
